_purpose: Per-series adequacy block to be merged into Technical/series_registry.json by the main thread after Wave 3 closeout.

Legacy quoted URL http://www.bea.gov/national/index.htm#gdp also returns 200

issues_resolved: BLS CPS primary URL reachable HTTP 200 (https://www.bls.gov/cps/)

UEMPMEAN 2011 top-coding break diagnosed and treatment ratified (no adjustment, document the break)

S1402.components.duration.break_description: BLS raised UEMPMEAN top-coding from 104w to 260w in January 2011

issues_resolved: Dead FRED W270RE1Q156NBEA quarterly wage-share substitute identified (HTTP 404)
Substitute canonicalized: W209RC1 + GDP at quarterly frequency (both HTTP 200, NIPA-consistent)
Q1 RESOLUTION: quarterly intensity construction — aggregate monthly UNRATE/UEMPMEAN to quarterly means; rebase to 1948Q1-1951Q4 base
HP filter lambda=100 (not 1600) for quarterly per Shaikh's explicit Appendix 14.2 choice
issues_outstanding: Phase 5: update dossier extension_candidates[0].url and .source to W209RC1 + GDP
Phase 5: validate against Appendix14_InflationULdata.xlsx quarterly tab if present, else visual against Fig 14.12 phase trajectory

S1403.proxy_justification: W270RE1Q156NBEA -> W209RC1+GDP is a within-FRED ID routing update to the SAME NIPA Table 1.10 line 2 underlying series at quarterly frequency. Not a concept-changing substitution; no `proxy: true` flag required.

issues_resolved: Derives from S1401 (wage share) and S1402 (intensity), both adequacy-ready
gwsh = first-difference of natural log convention to be confirmed against first 3 observations of published gwsh column
issues_outstanding: Phase 5: cell-by-cell validation of gwsh against Appendix14 published values

issues_resolved: Q3 RESOLUTION: Phillips form b coefficient — published fit uses y = C(1) + x^C(3) (constrained b=1); Phase 5 emits BOTH constrained and unconstrained variants
Q4 RESOLUTION: 1983-1993 transition window preserved as omission; third regime evaluated separately in Phase 6
issues_outstanding: Phase 5: apply HP(100) to FULL extended sample (avoid endpoint bias)
Phase 5: replicate published era 1 (a=-1.026431, c=-0.010677, R²=0.931) and era 2 (a=-1.010996, c=-0.003709, R²=0.965) before extending

fit_specification.functional_form_phase5_canonical: y = a + b*x^c (emit both constrained b=1 and free b)
fit_specification.phase6_third_regime_check: evaluate era 2 on 1994-2007 vs 1994-2024 parameter stability

issues_resolved: FRED GDPDEF and B4701C0A222NBEA extension URLs reachable HTTP 200
Q5 RESOLUTION: productivity = real GDP per FTE per Shaikh's exact formula (NOT BLS per-hour); concept-policing rule enforced
Chain-type vs fixed-weighted deflator question resolved: use chain-type GDP price index per current FRED vintage
FEE coverage question resolved: use B4701C0A222NBEA (FTE all industries, NIPA T6.5 broadest measure)
issues_outstanding: Phase 5 HARD GATE: implement productivity formula literally as yr = (GDP*100/p)/(FEE/1000) — do not algebraically simplify (silent scaling risk)
Phase 5 unit-test: compare output to Appendix14 published productivity column for 1948, 1972, 1996, 2011

S1406.rejection_rationale: Per-hour productivity differs from per-FTE by hours-per-worker trend; substitution silently breaks Shaikh's wage-share decomposition wr = w/p, gwsh = wr - yr (Eq. 14.18-14.19).

issues_resolved: Inherits all extension URLs from S1401, S1402, S1406 (all HTTP 200)
Inherits productivity-concept-policing from S1406
Inherits UEMPMEAN 2011 break treatment from S1402
issues_outstanding: Phase 5: emit BOTH variants of two-era curves — (a) direct refit to real-wage growth, (b) algebraic S1405 + HP(100)-productivity-growth per Eq. 14.18

issues_resolved: Inherits all extension URLs from S1401, S1402, S1406 (all HTTP 200)
Inherits productivity-concept-policing from S1406
Inherits UEMPMEAN 2011 break treatment from S1402
Off-by-one window discrepancy resolved: use 1949-1982 / 1994-2011 (Appendix 14.2 documented; first-difference loses 1948)
issues_outstanding: Phase 5: emit BOTH direct-fit and algebraic-decomposition variants per Eq. 14.19
Phase 5: replicate Table 14.3 secondary regression of residual nominal-wage growth on inflation + productivity growth (era 1 inflation coef ≈ ~1, productivity coef ≈ 0.82)

url_substitutions.rationale: W270RE1Q156NBEA returns HTTP 404 (FRED retired). W209RC1 (Compensation of employees, paid: Domestic industries, quarterly) and GDP (quarterly) jointly reconstruct the quarterly wage share Shaikh used. Both 200. Within-FRED routing update; not a concept substitution.

phase3_open_question_resolutions.Q1_S1403_quarterly_intensity: Aggregate monthly UNRATE and UEMPMEAN to quarterly means; rebase duration index to 1948Q1-1951Q4 (16-quarter) base; intensity = quarterly_UNRATE * (quarterly_duration_index/100).
phase3_open_question_resolutions.Q2_UEMPMEAN_2011_topcoding: Use raw FRED UEMPMEAN throughout. Annotate `methodological_break_2011-01: true` in registry. No backward adjustment.
phase3_open_question_resolutions.Q3_S1405_phillips_b_coefficient: Published fit uses constrained b=1 form y = C(1) + x^C(3). Phase 5 emits both constrained (replicates published a, c) and unconstrained y = a + b*x^c variants.
phase3_open_question_resolutions.Q4_1983_1993_transition_window: Preserve omission. Evaluate third regime in Phase 6 by comparing era 2 fits on 1994-2007 vs 1994-2024.
phase3_open_question_resolutions.Q5_S1406_productivity_definition: HARD RULE: productivity = real GDP per FTE per Shaikh's exact formula yr = (GDP*100/p)/(FEE/1000). REJECT BLS per-hour substitutes (OPHNFB, PRS85006092, OPHPBS, OPHMFG).

S1402.components.duration.break_description: BLS raised UEMPMEAN top-coding from 104 weeks to 260 weeks in January 2011

S1407.extend_via: derived from S1401 components + GDPDEF + B4701C0A222NBEA
